description_long: This is a robust, modern all-terrain vehicle with a four-door cab and a spacious open cargo bed at the rear, designed for both utility and passenger comfort. The exterior features angular, armored-style body panels in a two-tone color scheme of light gray and dark gray, giving it a rugged, tactical appearance. The front end is equipped with a prominent grille, aggressive headlights, and a reinforced bumper, while the sides display large, geometric wheel arches and sturdy running boards. The rear cargo bed includes visible utility elements such as a mounted fire extinguisher and storage compartments, emphasizing its readiness for demanding environments. Large, all-terrain tires with deep tread patterns and robust alloy wheels suggest excellent off-road capability. The vehicle's overall design is both functional and imposing, suitable for urban and off-road scenarios.
description: A rugged, angular all-terrain vehicle with a four-door cab, open cargo bed, and armored-style body panels in light and dark gray. Features large all-terrain tires, reinforced bumpers, and utility elements for urban and off-road use.
description_view_0: Front view shows the aggressive grille, angular hood, and prominent headlights, emphasizing the armored and tactical design.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the four-door cab, large wheel arches, running boards, and the open cargo bed with visible utility items.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the open cargo bed, tailgate, rear lights, and utility storage, emphasizing the vehicle's carrying capacity.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the four-door cab, wheel arches, running boards, and cargo bed details.
attribute_tire_tread_pattern: The tires have a deep, blocky all-terrain tread pattern, designed for optimal traction on both paved roads and rough, uneven surfaces.
